zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri I de Namur於1070年出生在比利時納姆爾比艾福奧易時，他的父親Albert III de Namur35歲，母親Ida von Sachsen40歲。他於1116年與Mathilde van Limburg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1138年6月5日在比利時盧布格拉 洛--亞登享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri I de Namur于1070年出生在比利时納姆爾比艾福奧易时，他的父亲Albert III de Namur35岁，母亲Ida von Sachsen40岁。他于1116年与Mathilde van Limburg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1138年6月5日在比利时盧布格拉 洛--亞登享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri I de Namur was born in 1070, in Oizy, Bièvre, Namur, Belgium, his father, Albert III de Namur, was 35 and his mother, Ida von Sachsen, was 40. He married Mathilde van Limburg in 1116. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 5 June 1138, in La Roche-en-Ardenne, Luxembourg, Belgium, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri I de Namur est né en 1070, à Oizy, Bièvre, Namur, Belgique, son père, Albert III de Namur, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ida von Sachsen, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde van Limburg en 1116. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1138, à La Roche-en-Ardenne, Luxembourg, Belgique, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri I de Namur 1070 in Oizy, Bièvre, Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albert III de Namur 35 und seine Mutter Ida von Sachsen 40. Er hat 1116 Mathilde van Limburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1138 im Alter von 68 Jahren in La Roche-en-Ardenne, Luxemburg, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri I de Namur è nato il nel 1070 nel Oizy, Bièvre, Namur, Belgio, il suo padre, Albert III de Namur, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Ida von Sachsen, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde van Limburg nel 1116. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 giugno 1138, nel La Roche-en-Ardenne, Lussemburgo, Belgio, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri I de Namurが1070年にベルギーナムルビevアオイズイで生まれた時，父Albert III de Namurは35歳，母Ida von Sachsenは40歳であった。1116年にMathilde van Limburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1138年6月5日にベルギールクセンボウルグラ ロチェ-エン-アルデンで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri I de Namur(이)가 1070년 벨기에 남어 비e브르 이즈이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert III de Namur(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida von Sachsen(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1116년 Mathilde van Limburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1138년 6월 5일 벨기에 루세보우르그 라 록헤--아르데니에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri I de Namur nasceu em 1070, em Oizy, Bièvre, Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Albert III de Namur, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ida von Sachsen, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde van Limburg em 1116. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1138, em La Roche-en-Ardenne, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri I de Namur родился в 1070 г. в местности оизи, биeвр, намур, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Albert III de Namur было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida von Sachsen, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde van Limburg в 1116 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 июня 1138 г. в местности ла роше-ен-арденн, луксембург, Бельгия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri I de Namur nació en 1070, en Oizy, Bièvre, Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Albert III de Namur, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ida von Sachsen, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Mathilde van Limburg en 1116. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de junio de 1138, en La Roche-en-Ardenne, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, a la edad de 68 años.
